_copy.footer_stage_notice: This site is in product-preview mode. It is not a live sales page, preorder page, or waitlist. The only active conversion is product updates.
_copy.footer_privacy_notice: Email sign-up is used for product updates only. It does not reserve stock or create a purchase commitment, and people can unsubscribe at any time.

_notes.nav_scope: US-market launch-preview navigation: Home + Product Details + FAQ + Notify Me anchor
_notes.footer_scope: Footer keeps Preview Terms, FAQ, and Privacy Policy while the homepage section handles the update form
_notes.page_templates: Suggested page handles: copper-kettle-preview -> page.copper-kettle-preview, preview-stage -> page.preview-stage, faq -> page.faq
_notes.menu_config: Create main-menu and footer-menu in Shopify Online Store > Navigation and mirror the links above
